post.summary: Register a new user account (no tenant assignment at registration)
Login with email and password — returns user + tenant memberships list

403.description: Not a member of this tenant or membership suspended

post.summary: Switch active tenant context — issues new JWT scoped to the selected tenant
Refresh access token using refresh token from HttpOnly cookie (single-use rotation)
Logout — revoke refresh tokens and blacklist access token

get.summary: Get current authenticated user profile with tenant memberships

post.summary: Create a new tenant (Super Admin only)

get.summary: List tenants — Super Admin sees all, others see own tenants
Get tenant by ID (Super Admin or own Tenant Admin)

patch.summary: Update tenant settings (Super Admin or own Tenant Admin)
Update tenant status — suspend/activate (Super Admin only)
Transfer tenant ownership (Super Admin or current owner)

parameters.name: roleId
parameters.description: Filter by role ID (FK to Role table)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by user email, firstName, or lastName

get.summary: List members of the current tenant (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)
Get a member by ID (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)

delete.summary: Remove a member from the tenant (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)

403.description: Cannot change own role or assign SUPER_ADMIN

patch.summary: Change the role of a member (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)
Suspend a member (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)
Activate a suspended member (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)

403.description: Instructor can only invite STUDENT role

409.description: Duplicate invitation or member already exists

post.summary: Create an invitation (Tenant Admin or Instructor)

get.summary: List all invitations for the current tenant (Tenant Admin)

409.description: Invitation is not in PENDING status

post.description: Accepts an invitation using the token from the invitation link. If the caller is authenticated (JWT present), their user ID is used. If unauthenticated, the system looks up the user by the invitation email. If no account exists, a message is returned asking the user to register first.
post.summary: Accept an invitation by token (Public or authenticated)

get.summary: List all platform-wide roles (authenticated)

post.summary: Create a new custom role (Super Admin only)

get.summary: Get a role by ID (authenticated)

patch.summary: Update a role name/description (Super Admin only)

delete.summary: Delete a custom role (Super Admin only)

get.summary: List all permissions in the platform catalog (Super Admin only)

409.description: Permission with same action+subject already exists

post.summary: Create a new permission in the catalog (Super Admin only)

get.summary: Get a permission by ID (Super Admin only)

delete.summary: Delete a permission from the catalog (Super Admin only)

get.summary: List all role-permission assignments for the current tenant (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)

409.description: Permission already assigned to this role in this tenant

post.summary: Assign a permission to a role in the current tenant (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)

404.description: Assignment not found or does not belong to this tenant

delete.summary: Remove a role-permission assignment from the current tenant (Tenant Admin + Super Admin)

get.summary: List all users globally (Super Admin only)
Get user by ID (Super Admin or self)

patch.summary: Update user profile (Super Admin or self)

post.summary: Create a new course (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: List courses (role-filtered: students see PUBLISHED only)
Get course by ID with sections and lesson counts

patch.summary: Update course (Instructor own course or Tenant Admin)

delete.summary: Delete course (Instructor own course or Tenant Admin)

422.description: Course has no sections or lessons

patch.summary: Publish course — requires at least 1 section and 1 lesson

post.summary: Create a section in a course (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: List all sections in a course

patch.summary: Update a section (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

delete.summary: Delete a section (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

post.summary: Create a lesson in a section (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: List all lessons in a section
Get a single lesson by ID

patch.summary: Update a lesson (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

delete.summary: Delete a lesson (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: Get quiz by ID (students see answers without isCorrect)

post.summary: Add a question with answers to a quiz

patch.summary: Update a question (replaces all answers if provided)

delete.summary: Delete a question from a quiz

post.summary: Submit a quiz attempt (enrolled students only)

get.summary: List quiz attempts (students see own, instructors/admins see all)

post.summary: Create a quiz in a course section (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

post.description: Students self-enroll (body: courseId only). Tenant Admins and Instructors grant access to a specific user (body: courseId + userId). The caller role from the JWT determines which path is taken.
post.summary: Enroll in a course or grant access to another user

get.summary: List all enrollments for the current user (filtered by tenant if in tenant context)
Get enrollment detail (students see own, instructors/admins see all)

403.description: Forbidden — not course owner or admin

get.summary: List all enrollments for a course (Instructor own course, Tenant Admin, Super Admin)

post.summary: Update lesson progress for an enrollment (recalculates overall progress)

get.summary: Liveness probe — always 200 if process is running
Readiness probe — checks PostgreSQL and Redis connectivity

info.title: Pandalang API
info.description: Backend API for Pandalang EdTech SaaS multi-tenant platform. Provides authentication, tenant management, course management, enrollments, quizzes, and progress tracking.

x-tenant-id.name: x-tenant-id
x-tenant-id.description: Tenant ID header for multi-tenant routing

password.description: Min 8 chars, must contain lowercase, uppercase, and digit

tenantId.description: ID of the tenant to switch to

ownerId.description: User ID of the tenant owner

roleId.description: FK to Role table — the new role to assign to the member

email.description: Email address of the person to invite

roleId.description: Role ID (FK to Role table) to assign upon acceptance

token.description: Invitation token from the invitation link

description.example: Can manage course content but not users

isSystem.description: System roles cannot be renamed or deleted

description.example: Can manage course content but not users
Can manage course content but not users

inverted.description: If true, this is a deny rule

action.description: CASL action (e.g. read, create, update, delete, manage)

conditions.description: Optional ABAC conditions JSON. Use ${user.id} for user-scoped conditions.

inverted.description: If true, this is a "cannot" rule (deny). Defaults to false.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for this permission rule.

tenantId.description: Tenant ID this assignment belongs to

isSuperAdmin.description: True if this user is a platform super admin

tenants.description: Tenants the user is a member of (with role info)

description.example: Learn the basics of Mandarin Chinese
Learn the basics of Mandarin Chinese
Take your Mandarin to the next level
Learn the four tones of Mandarin
Learn the four tones of Mandarin

question.example: Which tone is represented by a flat line?

description.example: Test your knowledge of the four tones

question.example: Which tone is represented by a flat line?

description.example: Test your knowledge of the four tones

grantedBy.description: User ID who granted access (null for self-enrollment)

lessonId.description: UUID of the lesson to update progress for

timeSpentSeconds.description: Time spent on lesson in seconds
